## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (and pass locally: `uv run pytest -v`)
- [ ] `uv run ruff check khata tests` is clean
- [ ] `uv run ruff format khata tests` is applied
- [ ] Docs updated if public API / user-visible behaviour changed
- [ ] For a new broker adapter: fixture file(s) in `tests/fixtures/<broker>/` + mapper tests included
- [ ] For a schema change: migration path documented in the PR description
